description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a dark fence and landscaped with green lawns, shrubs, and a blossoming tree. The structure features a combination of light-colored exterior walls and a dark, multi-gabled roof, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a pedestrian pathway, and a small garden bed. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with additional greenery and a patio area. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and grouped patterns, with some arched and others rectangular. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of functional and aesthetic landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and landscaped gardens within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, double garage, and landscaped garden with a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage doors, side lawn, and the depth of the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, arched windows, and grouped landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, rear roofline, and the continuation of the fence and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and arched windows on rear facade
